changes: The icons of certain rogue actions have been adjusted to improve visibility.
The icons of certain ninja actions have been adjusted to improve visibility.

new_content.name: Second Coil of Bahamut
new_content.description: Raid content adjusted for solo queueing, item level requirements, mechanic changes, and the addition of the Echo.

new_content.name: Second Coil of Bahamut (Savage)
new_content.description: High-difficulty raid variation; note that general Echo adjustments do not apply here.

new_content.name: The Binding Coil of Bahamut
new_content.description: Raid content; items from this raid now qualify for Expert Delivery missions.

new_content.name: The Final Coil of Bahamut - Turn 2
new_content.description: Raid dungeon; resolved an issue where ADS could not be attacked.

new_content.name: The Final Coil of Bahamut - Turn 3
new_content.description: Raid dungeon; resolved an issue where the action Whitefire did not deal damage.

new_content.name: Snowcloak
new_content.description: Dungeon; resolved an issue with the Frozen debuff during Snow Drift and a map icon display issue.

new_content.name: The Sunken Temple of Qarn (Hard)
new_content.description: Dungeon; resolved issues regarding stone spawns and Mummification status effects.

new_content.name: Sylph-management
new_content.description: Main scenario quest; now a requirement for unlocking level 30 job quests.

new_content.name: The Echo
new_content.description: System that increases player maximum HP, damage dealt, and healing potency by 10% in the Second Coil of Bahamut.

new_content.name: Duty Finder
new_content.description: System that now allows for solo queuing into the Second Coil of Bahamut.

new_content.name: Expert Delivery
new_content.description: System for delivering items; adjusted to include specific rogue/ninja primal weapons and Binding Coil of Bahamut gear.

housing.name: assorted fruit
housing.description: A furnishing item whose colors were adjusted to better compliment other furnishings.

housing.name: Afternoon Tea Set
housing.description: A furnishing item that had incorrect bonuses addressed in the patch.

glamour.name: Lunar Summer Tanga
glamour.description: An item previously inaccessible via the Calamity Salvager NPCs.

glamour.name: Pristine Egg Cap
glamour.description: An item previously inaccessible via the Calamity Salvager NPCs.
